flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Carolina University are 29% below the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($32.9k vs $46.2k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Carolina University fell 57% between 2021 and 2024 (50.0% → 21.6%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Carolina University fell 37% between 2021 and 2024 (30.8% → 19.3%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Carolina University rose 22% between 2021 and 2024 ($14.4k → $17.6k).
